title: STEM Internships & Fellowships at Federal Agencies
description: 200+ paid STEM internships and fellowships at DOE labs, FDA, EPA, and other federal agencies. Open to US citizens/permanent residents.

title: Undergraduate Research Internship – Computing
description: 12-week research internship at Microsoft Research labs. AI, systems, HCI, programming languages.

title: Math REU
description: 10-week NSF-funded Math REU. Number theory, combinatorics, probability. Open to all US citizens/permanent residents.

title: SCGSR – Graduate Student Research
description: PhD students conduct thesis research at a DOE national lab. 3-12 month projects. Open to US citizens/permanent residents.

title: SULI – Science Undergraduate Laboratory Internship
description: Paid internship at 17 DOE national labs. AI, quantum computing, nuclear energy, biotechnology, fusion science, and more.

title: Gilliam Fellows Program
compensation: Up to $159,000 over 3 years + postdoc support
description: For PhD students in biomedical sciences. Three years of funding plus career development. Open to all US institutions.

title: NDiSTEM Conference Travel Scholarship
description: Largest diversity in STEM conference. Research presentations, mentoring, and career expo. Open to all.

title: ACS National Meeting – Undergraduate Poster & Travel Grants
description: Present research at the largest chemistry conference. Travel grants available for undergrads. Open to all.

title: iGEM Competition
description: International synthetic biology competition. Teams design and build biological systems. Open to all universities worldwide.

title: Summer Undergraduate Research Fellowship (SURF)
description: 11-week research fellowship at NIST labs. Physics, chemistry, engineering, CS, and more. 2027 applications open ~Oct 2026.

title: Ernest F. Hollings Undergraduate Scholarship
description: Scholarship for undergrads in NOAA-related fields. Two years of academic support plus a paid summer internship. Applications open Sept-Jan.

title: Graduate Research Fellowship Program (GRFP)
description: Premier graduate fellowship in STEM. Three years of support for research-based master's or doctoral programs. Deadlines vary by field (Nov 10-14).

title: Goldwater Scholarship
description: Premier undergraduate scholarship in STEM. For sophomores and juniors with research interest. Campus nomination required.

title: Pathways Internship Program
description: Paid internships across NASA centers. Engineering, science, IT, and more. Positions posted year-round on USAJOBS.

title: Student Internship Program
description: R&D internships at Sandia National Labs. Cybersecurity, nuclear, energy, materials, and computing research.

title: Undergraduate Student Program
description: Research internships at Los Alamos. Physics, chemistry, biology, engineering, CS, and data science. US citizenship required.

title: Learning on the Job (LOJ) Program
description: Hands-on research experience at Argonne National Laboratory in areas ranging from physics to environmental science.

title: Science Undergraduate Laboratory Internship
description: Research internship at BNL. Nuclear and particle physics, materials science, chemistry, and computational science.

title: Summer Internship Program in Biomedical Research (SIP)
description: 8-week summer research at NIH Bethesda campus. Biomedical, behavioral, and social science research. Applications open Nov-Mar.

title: Amgen Scholars Program
description: Summer research at top US universities (Caltech, Stanford, MIT, Harvard, etc.). Life sciences and biotechnology. Applications open ~Nov.

title: STEP / Research Internship
description: Software engineering and research internships at Google. AI/ML, systems, cloud, and more. Positions posted year-round.

title: Research Internship
description: Research internship at IBM Research. Quantum computing, AI, cloud, and cybersecurity. PhD and undergraduate positions available.

title: Summer Student Fellow Program
description: 10-12 week summer research in ocean science and engineering. Marine biology, geochemistry, physical oceanography, and more.

title: Smithsonian Internship Program
description: Research and museum internships at 21 Smithsonian museums and research centers. Biology, astrophysics, earth science, and more.

title: International Summer Program
description: 5-week intensive courses at Seoul National University. 71 courses in English. Open to all international students.

title: QNS Summer School Program
description: 4-week immersive quantum nanoscience research at IBS Center for Quantum Nanoscience. Open to international students.

title: Global Research Internship
description: Research internship at Samsung AI and advanced technology labs. Open to international students in CS and engineering.

title: KAI-X Summer Research Internship
compensation: Fully funded: flights, housing, stipend, meals
description: 7-week summer research at KAIST. Physics, chemistry, math, biology, brain science. 2027 applications open ~Dec 2026.

title: Summer Undergraduate Research Program
description: 6-week summer research at POSTECH. EE, ME, chemistry, physics, CS, life sciences. 2027 applications open ~Jan 2027.

title: Global Internship Program
description: Research internship at Korea Institute of Science and Technology. Materials, robotics, energy, brain science, and AI.

title: Research Internship
description: AI and machine learning research internship at LG AI Research. Computer vision, NLP, multimodal AI, and foundation models.
